name: hsb-teamwork
description: HSB Teamwork — a demand-to-delivery toolkit. Each step is a skill invoked as /hsb-teamwork:<skill>. Available: origination-brainstorm (raw demand -> a fully-filled, confidence-graded document via a multi-agent pipeline, plus humanized/translated/enriched variants); readiness-package (the Product Owner's two-act journey: Act 1 triages an origination-record into a routing decision recorded as an Intake Record — only Product Ready proceeds — then Act 2 turns it into a frozen Readiness Package via draft-then-confirm with parallel section drafting and CTO-escalation detection). Planned: tech-assessment, prd-generation. Template-driven and portable; includes a Codex adapter.
